name: Marsia Brari
text: Pas çdo trajtimi mbetem shume e kënaqur me shërbimin e ofruar. Doktoresha eshte shume e komunikueshme, tregon gjithmone profesionalizem dhe perkushtim dhe eshte shume e kujdesshme gjate çdo procedure. Do ta rekomandoja te te gjithe!

name: Erjola Hoxha
text: I had an excellent experience with Dr. Grei. She is very professional, gentle, and attentive to detail. She made me feel comfortable from the moment I walked in and explained every step of the procedure clearly. The clinic is clean and well-organized. Highly recommend Dr. Grei to anyone looking for quality dental care! 👌

name: Loren Plipki
text: Best experience ever 😍

name: Artan Gjepali
text: Excellent service. I was very frightened in general from dentists when I came but with her it turned out that she was very professional and managed my fear and my teeth in the perfect mode. I would highly recommend.

name: Stefania Tuosto
text: Since 2022, when I first came for implants, I've had such a great experience that I've been coming back even just for a teeth cleaning. I'd rather fly from Rome and come here than be touched by Italian dentists. Grey is unique in her professionalism, competence, and kindness. I highly recommend her.

name: Tonino Monaco
text: Great professionalism and expertise. Excellent results. I highly recommend her.

name: Tiziana Carta
text: My husband had veneers and a cleaning done, we had a great time, very satisfied, reasonable prices and above all skill, competence and professionalism on the part of Dr. Grei.

name: Nevio Di Simone
text: I've had my teeth cleaned, had various treatments, and had veneers placed. She's fantastic, professional, and the best I've ever had. I highly recommend her. If you need anything, call her; she can give you directions to where to stay near the office. Fabulous prices.

name: Kristian Qose
text: I had a really great experience with my dentist! From the very first moment, you feel welcomed and at ease. Her professionalism, dedication, and care for patients are outstanding. She explains every procedure clearly and makes you feel comfortable throughout the entire treatment. The clinic is clean and modern, and the quality of her work is excellent with great attention to detail. I’m truly happy with the final result! Highly recommend to anyone looking for a trustworthy and skilled dentist! 🙌

name: Alba Kondakçiu
text: Shume e mire 😍😍😍

name: Dineta Iberdemaj
text: I had such a great experience with Dr. Grei! I first came in because I suddenly developed a really bad toothache, and she managed to fit me in the same day, which already told me a lot about how she treats her patients. From the moment I sat in the chair, I felt like I was in very capable hands. She didn’t just treat the immediate issue, she took her time to properly assess everything and noticed work that had been poorly done by previous dentists. What I appreciated most is how thorough and careful she is. She went back and corrected multiple teeth that hadn’t been done properly before, and you can tell she genuinely cares about doing things right, not just quickly. On top of that, she also did aesthetic work on my front teeth, and the result completely exceeded my expectations. My smile looks cleaner, more balanced, and honestly more beautiful than it ever has. You rarely find someone who combines technical skill with that level of attention to detail and care. I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for a dentist they can actually trust!!

name: Marsela Bakaj
text: I’ve been a regular patient at Grei’s Dental Clinic for over 10 years, and the care has always been excellent. The staff is professional, friendly, and always makes me feel comfortable during every visit. I highly recommend this clinic for its consistent quality and trustworthy service.

name: Erta Agolli
text: The best dental experience I’ve had at any clinic in Tirana. Grei is incredibly attentive and works with great precision. The results are consistently outstanding, I’ve never been happier with my smile.

name: Klementina Topjana
text: Great service, place, and Greisi was a very professional dentist!! Highly recommended. 🤍

name: Novjana Jakupi
text: Very professional, nice and clean clinic. I had an amazing experience!

name: Oluwaseun Fagbemi
text: Experience was very nice. Grei was very friendly, patient and was really ready to listen. Overall, I love the result from the procedure.

name: Kothapalli Lakshmi Samyuktha
text: We travelled long way from England, and prior we got all the proper information required and Dr. Grei was so down to earth and gave all minute information also so that we can decide prior to make any decision and the once after reaching clinic she was so welcoming and great at service and she was so detail in her work and explained everything and suggested well and I recommend my frnds too. Prices are affordable and reasonable.

name: Norma Iris
text: Really good dentist I got the results I want and more. From my teeth to my gums. She restored my confidence. I can’t wait till it’s healed and show off my smile. I will 100% recommend and I myself will definitely come again.

name: Akif Ozturk
text: My toothache in Tirana, where I went for vacation, had become a nightmare. Thank you to everyone who relieved me of this pain.

name: Amanj
text: 10/10 experience. I travelled from London and had a sudden toothache, i was able to book a same day appointment and get my tooth filled. This clinic’s doctor is very light on the hands, and walks you through the whole process. Definitely got my moneys worth.

name: Jewel Zaman
text: Excellent Service at Grei's Dental Clinic, Tirana. I went in for a hygiene appointment, but the level of care Dr. Grei provided was truly exceptional. In my lifetime, I have never come across a better dentist. Truly outstanding—thumbs up!

name: ECO SOLUTION
text: Klinika dentare me e mire ne tirane!!!

name: Ina Zace
text: A professional talented doctor , I loved her job my teeth thank you 😁

name: Anna Miriam
text: Grazzie Mille. Sei bravissima, sono felice del risultato 😁

name: Mary Lou Bisceglia
text: Dearest Dr. Grei, thank you so much for the care and special time you took with Mark. His teeth are beautiful he loves them, everyone loves them. We are hoping we can some friends interested in coming to Beautiful Albania and spend quality time in your country. We are thinking of you and your kindness.

name: Sperashpresahope
text: Ju falenderoi per kujdesin, punen, estetiken Recommended te gjith tek juve kush do ket nevoi perkujdesje dhe gjithshka mbi dhembet. SUKSESE NE KARRIEREN TUAJ. UN JAM NDIER SHUM MIR DHE ME FAT QE JU GJETA JUVE
